functions.label: generateApmServicesData
description:
Generates APM service data.
Can be used both by CLI (via default export) and by API tests (via direct import).

functions.label: generateElasticApmJvmMetrics
description:
Generates Elastic APM JVM metrics data.
Uses native Elastic APM field paths: jvm.memory.heap.*, system.process.cpu.*, etc.

functions.label: generateErrorGroupsData
description:
Generates APM error data for error groups testing.
These will appear in `spanExceptionGroups` response.

functions.label: generateHostsData
description:
Generates infrastructure metrics and APM data for a set of hosts.
Can be used both by CLI (via default export) and by API tests (via direct import).

functions.label: generateLogCategoriesData
description:
Generates log data with various categories/patterns for a service.
These will appear in `nonExceptionLogGroups` response.

functions.label: generateLogExceptionGroupsData
description:
Generates OTel log exception data for log exception groups testing.
These represent exceptions logged via OTel semantic conventions (event.name: "exception").
These will appear in `logExceptionGroups` response.

functions.label: generateLogRateAnalysisSpikeData
description:
Generates a spike-pattern log dataset for log rate analysis.
Emits steady baseline logs and introduces a flood of timeout errors
in the last 20 minutes of the range so the tool can attribute the spike.

functions.label: generateLogsData
description: Generates log data.

functions.label: generateLogsServicesData
description:
Generates logs data with service.name field.
Can be used both by CLI (via default export) and by API tests (via direct import).

functions.label: generateOtelJvmMetricsDocs
description:
Generates OTel stable semconv JVM metrics documents for direct ES indexing.
This is needed because synthtrace doesn't have native OTel metrics support.

returnComment: Array of documents ready for ES bulk indexing

functions.label: generateTraceMetricsData

Generates APM transaction data for trace metrics testing.

functions.label: indexOtelJvmMetrics

Used by tests and the CLI bootstrap phase.
